summary: Testing complete for new mandatory user registration fields (street_address, postal_code, city, date_of_birth). All backend and frontend tests passed. The feature is fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: Registration with all new fields succeeds (200 OK)
Backend: Registration fails when street_address is missing (422)
Backend: Registration fails when postal_code is missing (422)
Backend: Registration fails when city is missing (422)
Backend: Registration fails when date_of_birth is missing (422)
Backend: Registration fails when all new fields are missing (422)
Backend: New fields correctly persisted in MongoDB and retrieved via /api/auth/me
Frontend: All 4 new input fields visible with correct data-testid attributes
Frontend: HTML5 required attribute set on all new fields
Frontend: Empty form submission blocked by client-side validation
Frontend: Form with missing new fields blocked by client-side validation
Frontend: Complete form submission succeeds and redirects to /subscription
Frontend: French translations working (Adresse (rue), Code postal, Ville, Date de naissance)
Frontend: English translations working (Street Address, Postal Code, City, Date of Birth)

test_credentials.note: Test users created during testing with pattern: test_*@test.com, playwright_*@test.com

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with new fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: New mandatory fields for user registration (street_address, postal_code, city, date_of_birth) are fully implemented and tested. Backend validation returns 422 for missing fields. Frontend has HTML5 required validation. Translations work in both FR and EN.

backend_api.validation: Pydantic model requires all 4 new fields
backend_api.persistence: Fields stored in MongoDB users collection

frontend_form.validation: HTML5 required attribute on all new fields
